brand.subtitle: Your photos, clips, and music — made easy. Auto-edited into a polished video without lifting a finger.

home.demoCaption: A still photo drifts gently to life

steps.uploadDesc: Drop in your photos, clips, and music all at once.
steps.arrangeDesc: Order, transitions, and Ken Burns applied for you.
steps.caption: Review captions
steps.captionDesc: Polish the auto-generated caption draft and confirm.

auth.title: Log in to {brand}
auth.subtitle: Get started with your Google account.

dashboard.title: My projects
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create a new project and upload photos to begin.

upload.hint: Drag & drop, or click to choose.
upload.emptyDesc: You can add several files at once.

tone.title: Video mood
tone.note: Describe the mood you want — effects, transitions, and timing adjust automatically.
tone.placeholder: e.g. calm family video / lively store promo
tone.applyHint: Re-flows every clip's effect & duration and the transition to match the tone.

inspector.title: Clip settings
inspector.selectHint: Select a clip in the timeline.
inspector.caption: Caption

preview.empty: Upload a photo or video to see the preview.
preview.reducedMotion: Reduced motion is on — shown without effects.

transition.title: Transitions
transition.note: Applies the clip-to-clip transition consistently across the whole video.

render.planRequired: Cloud rendering requires a Pro plan.
render.note: Combines photos, video, captions, and music into an MP4. May take a while depending on length.

captions.title: Auto captions
captions.note: Generate a caption draft from speech, then review. Korean may have recognition errors.
captions.needAudio: Upload music (MP3) or a video with speech to auto-generate captions.
